name: Five Way Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil over medium-high flame.
2. Add chicken, onions, bell peppers, and garlic to the pan.
3. Cook until the chicken is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in crushed tomatoes, tomato sauce, chili powder, cocoa powder, cinnamon, cumin, allspice, ground cloves, salt, and black pepper.
5. Bring mixture to a boil over high flame.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes more.
7. Meanwhile, heat kidney beans in a saucepan over medium flame.
